Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added
target uses the URI form board://item-b75b12bb
standouts: Target is a board:// URI referencing a specific board item
The file is purely metadata with no payload content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a small, fixed set of metadata fields
References an external entity with a board:// URI scheme
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset
concerns: No payload or descriptive content beyond the metadata link
The board:// URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
No indication of who or what created the attachment
notes: A dated channel-memory attachment record that points a board_items attachment at board item item-b75b12bb in dragnet-development.
